name: flatbuffers-wasm-docs
description: Browser documentation and explorer for FlatBuffers WASM capabilities

scripts.build: vite build && cp streaming-dispatcher.js streaming-dispatcher.wasm dist/ && cp -R videos dist/
scripts.check:links: node scripts/check-doc-links.mjs index.html . && node scripts/check-landing-docs.mjs . && node scripts/check-landing-docs.mjs dist && node scripts/check-sdn-stack-nav.mjs flatbuffers index.html styles.css dist/index.html && node --test scripts/materialize-pages.test.mjs
